case_title: BRENDA H JOHNSON VS. TIMOTHY JAMES HOEY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, BRENDA H AS TO DEFENDANT HOEY, TIMOTHY JAMES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-03-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-05-2002

PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT, NTC TO PLAINTIFF RE:STATUS AND SETTING CONFERENCE; PARTY SERVED-TIMOTHY JAMES HOEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, BRENDA H
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HOEY, TIMOTHY JAMES
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, BRENDA H JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-01-2002. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-19-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. MAY-03-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUL-11-2002.
